Title: Establishes a food bank for pets pilot program
Summary: Establishes a food bank for pets pilot program which provides food for cats and dogs to pet owners who have financial challenges in providing for their pets without assistance.
LawCode: Add §387, Ag & Mkts L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the agriculture and markets law and the state finance law, in relation to establishing a food bank for pets pilot program
